collection.title: Collection
collection.description: Manage and track your Pokémon cards.

CameraPreviewOverlay.placeBetweenLines: Place the card between the lines
CameraPreviewOverlay.informationInstruction: Click on the part you want more information about

setDetail.title: Set name and number
setDetail.intro: The abbreviation ASC at the bottom of your card stands for the set Ascended Heroes. This is a set released in early 2026 as part of the Mega Evolution series.
setDetail.setCodeBody: This lets you see at a glance which series the card comes from.
setDetail.numberBody: This tells you exactly which card this is within the full set. In this case, it is card number 39 of the 217 cards officially in the set.

CameraPreviewOverlay.authenticityScanFront: Scan the front of the card
CameraPreviewOverlay.authenticityScanBack: Scan the back of the card

authenticityResult.title: Oh No!
authenticityResult.intro: This card is unfortunately not genuine.
authenticityResult.details: We have checked the details and found a few things that don't match the official version. Especially the font and the way the card glints are different. Don't panic, this happens to the best collectors as well. Below are the details:
authenticityResult.whatNowOnlineLabel: If you bought this card online:
authenticityResult.whatNowOnlineBody: Contact customer service right away. Use a screenshot of this scan as proof to get your money back.
authenticityResult.whatNowFairLabel: If you bought this card at a fair or market stall:
authenticityResult.whatNowFairBody: Go back to the seller. Calmly show the differences in this app; most sellers want to keep their good name and will sort it out for you.
authenticityResult.whatNowTradeLabel: If you got this card through a trade with a friend:
authenticityResult.whatNowTradeBody: Use this as a learning moment for both of you. Show where the font or shine differs so you will not be fooled next time.
authenticityResult.whatNowTipBody: Never sell or trade this card as a genuine card. Use it for arts and crafts instead, or keep it as comparison material, so we keep the hobby honest together!
